resets: Individual throne-room speech order ends once Dorothy reaches the heel-click threshold.
persists: farewell_cadence COMPANIONS_FIRST persists into the final unresolved departure scene.
Companion gratitude from being properly honored persists into their last lines.
escalates: Repeated companion-first choices compound farewell tenderness and explicit gratitude.

paths.label: C
paths.immediate_effect: When Dorothy asks whether she may stay a little longer, Glinda answers her plainly instead of hurrying her, and a hush falls over the ruby room because the possibility of delay is admitted, though not praised.
paths.current_session_echo: The farewell begins under a quieter, more thoughtful stillness; companions speak more softly, and Glinda's instructions include the cost of waiting as well as the means of going.
paths.next_session_payoff: At the session opening, Glinda's calm face and Dorothy's unworn Shoes share the first image, and the immediate stake is whether delay will comfort the heart or only sharpen the pain.
paths.later_session_legacy: The homecoming will carry a trace of chosen hesitation, making Kansas feel not merely won but weighed against love and found necessary.
paths.defining_line_captured: You ask whether love may delay destiny without losing it.

consequence_visibility.what_changes: Glinda becomes gently firmer and the room's pace slows into reflective stillness because Dorothy tries to balance staying and leaving.
consequence_visibility.how_player_sees_it: The player hears Glinda state the cost of delay plainly and feels the scene pause instead of rushing onward.

world_state_delta.inventory: Silver Shoes knowledge_of_true_power set to KNOWN

npc_shifts.direction: deeper affection because Dorothy does not rush away

world_state_delta.emotional_ledger_entry: defining_moral_choices +1: Tried to hold home and friendship together a little longer.

resets: The abstract question of delay closes once Dorothy reaches the final threshold with the Shoes ready.
persists: farewell_cadence HESITANT_BALANCE persists into the session-end hook.
Glinda's firmer explanatory tone persists through heel-click instruction.
escalates: Repeated balanced or delaying choices compound the symbolic theme that good things may conflict without wickedness.

paths.label: A
paths.immediate_effect: N/A — session ends on this choice
paths.current_session_echo: The ruby room holds still; the Lion has stepped nearer, the Tin Woodman is wiping his eyes carefully, and Glinda waits without speaking because Dorothy has asked for one more moment.
paths.next_session_payoff: Glinda begins next session by saying, "Take your little time, my child, but not too much," and the first active beat is whether Dorothy will turn that pause into departure or into another delay.
paths.next_session_opening: Tender and suspended; first image: Dorothy standing motionless in the ruby room with Toto pressed under her chin; first character: Glinda watching quietly; immediate stakes: one more breath may comfort the heart, but the command still must be spoken.
paths.later_session_legacy: The homecoming will be shaded by the knowledge that Dorothy did not leap from Oz lightly, but stood and bore the sorrow before acting.
paths.defining_line_captured: You stand with home underfoot and still ask time of sorrow.

consequence_visibility.what_changes: The ending image becomes a held pause rather than a completed farewell or sudden reversal.
consequence_visibility.how_player_sees_it: The player sees every character wait on Dorothy's pause, and the next session opens inside that same suspended stillness.

world_state_delta.inventory: Silver Shoes equipped and ready; command not yet spoken
world_state_delta.emotional_ledger_entry: sacrifices_made +1: Delayed the final step to bear parting more honestly.

resets: Session-end freeze itself clears when the next episode resumes action.
persists: session_end_state FAREWELL_SUSPENDED persists into the next session opening.
Silver Shoes equipped_status and homeward readiness persist into the next session.
escalates: Repeated delay-at-parting behavior compounds Glinda's gentleness and companion closeness.

paths.label: B
paths.immediate_effect: N/A — session ends on this choice
paths.current_session_echo: Dorothy has given each friend a final word, and now the whole room is still in completed form; even Toto is quiet, and Glinda waits only for the three little knocks.
paths.next_session_payoff: The next session opens with Glinda asking, "Are you ready now?" and no one else interrupts, because Dorothy has already done all that ceremony can do.
paths.next_session_opening: Solemn and steady; first image: Dorothy facing Glinda with wet eyes and set mouth while the Silver Shoes shine beneath her frock; first character: Glinda; immediate stakes: the last act is ready and only courage to perform it remains.
paths.later_session_legacy: The homecoming will feel most complete in form, because Dorothy has finished every leave-taking before she goes.
paths.defining_line_captured: You make leaving neat, though it breaks your heart.

consequence_visibility.what_changes: The ending image becomes one of finished ceremony and immediate readiness rather than pause or renewed embrace.
consequence_visibility.how_player_sees_it: The player sees the completed hush of a settled decision, and the next session begins with no remaining social business, only action.

world_state_delta.inventory: Silver Shoes equipped and ready; command prepared

npc_shifts.direction: greater respect and warmth for Dorothy's steadiness

world_state_delta.emotional_ledger_entry: promises_kept_or_broken +1: Completed farewells faithfully before departure.

resets: Session-end freeze clears when the next episode resumes with the heel-click decision.
persists: session_end_state FAREWELL_COMPLETED_READY_TO_DEPART persists into the next session opening.
Silver Shoes equipped_status and prepared command persist into the next session.
escalates: Repeated orderly closure choices compound ceremonial respect from rulers and gatekeepers.

paths.label: C
paths.immediate_effect: N/A — session ends on this choice
paths.current_session_echo: The solemn room has been broken by Dorothy's sudden return into tears and embraces; Toto squirms in her arms, the Lion presses close, and even Glinda smiles instead of speaking.
paths.next_session_payoff: The next session opens with the companions still gathered around Dorothy, and Glinda must wait for the embraces to loosen before she can repeat the homeward command.
paths.next_session_opening: Warm and disorderly; first image: Dorothy half-hidden among straw, tin, mane, and tears while the Silver Shoes flash under her skirt; first character: the Tin Woodman trying not to rust; immediate stakes: love has interrupted departure, and Dorothy must still find the strength to break away.
paths.later_session_legacy: The homecoming will carry the strongest sense that Dorothy left Oz by tearing herself free from affection rather than by stepping away in clean order.
paths.defining_line_captured: You nearly go home, and love catches your sleeve.

consequence_visibility.what_changes: The ending image becomes a burst of renewed physical affection that interrupts the departure form already begun.
consequence_visibility.how_player_sees_it: The player sees Dorothy turn back bodily, not merely hesitate, and the next session opens inside that tangle of embraces.

world_state_delta.inventory: Silver Shoes equipped and ready; command interrupted by renewed farewell
world_state_delta.emotional_ledger_entry: defining_moral_choices +1: Let love interrupt the final act of leaving.

resets: Session-end freeze clears when the next episode resumes and the embraces must end.
persists: session_end_state DEPARTURE_INTERRUPTED_BY_LAST_EMBRACE persists into the next session opening.
Heightened companion closeness persists into their final spoken good-byes.
escalates: Repeated feeling-first reversals compound affectionate NPC behavior and softer narrator framing at partings.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If Dorothy's remembered treatment of the Monkey King trends respectful and non-wasteful by this point, especially if S6_C1 path A was chosen or earlier Golden Cap uses were framed as rescue.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: The Monkey King obeys formally, lands the party, and waits for Glinda's disposition of the Cap without added warmth.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: The Monkey King bows lower, calls Dorothy a just mistress, and later tells Glinda, "She used us for need and not for vanity," before yielding the Cap's future quietly.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: State the Monkey King's courtesy as a plain fact, and then let one simple line show that obedience has ripened into gratitude.

npc_reactions: Monkey King becomes more openly respectful.
Glinda reads Dorothy as safer with power.
environmental_details: The monkeys' landing is smooth and unhurried.
The transfer scene feels less tense around the Golden Cap.
dialogue_variations: Monkey King: "She commanded rightly."
Glinda: "Then the Cap has rested in decent hands."

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If Dorothy has two or more prior choices showing reluctance to use power or preference for plain means before enchantment.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Glinda explains the Golden Cap and Silver Shoes plainly, without special comment on Dorothy's habits.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Glinda adds, "You do not run first to magic, and that is often wise," before instructing Dorothy about surrendering or using enchanted objects.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Let Glinda's praise come as a calm little lesson, as if she were naming a quality already visible in the child.

npc_reactions: Glinda becomes warmer and more teacherly.
environmental_details: The throne room feels less judicial and more maternal.
dialogue_variations: Glinda adds a line of approval for Dorothy's restraint.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If player alignment tendency is neutral by this point and Dorothy has repeatedly tested necessity before spending aid.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Scarecrow approves the hill crossing only in general terms.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Scarecrow says, "You see, that was the very thing to do, after the hill had proved itself," and grows more initiative-taking in the next practical exchange.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Give the Scarecrow one neat explanatory sentence, and let his confidence show that Dorothy has taught him he will be listened to.

npc_reactions: Scarecrow speaks more confidently.
environmental_details: No major environmental shift.
dialogue_variations: Scarecrow gains a specific callback to tested necessity.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If Dorothy has a history of risking herself for companions or stepping toward danger, including S6_C1 path C.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: The Lion is sorrowful at parting but speaks mainly of missing Dorothy.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: The Lion moves physically nearer in farewell scenes and says some variation of, "I do not like to think of you where I cannot guard you," making his grief protective rather than only sad.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Name the Lion's great body coming closer, and then let his plain confession carry the feeling without flourish.

npc_reactions: Cowardly Lion becomes more protective.
Tin Woodman watches Dorothy with extra concern.
environmental_details: The farewell spacing closes; the Lion stands nearer than before.
dialogue_variations: Lion gains protective farewell lines.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If south_country_approach_style is GUIDED_COURTESY.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Glinda receives Dorothy kindly but in general royal form.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Glinda's first greeting explicitly notes Dorothy's courteous approach, and the guard girls speak of her as a child who asked the road instead of pressing it.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Let the castle answer courtesy with courtesy, so that one kind admission naturally leads to another.

npc_reactions: Glinda is warmer at first meeting.
Guard girls are less formal and more helpful.
environmental_details: Gates open without delay.
Servants bring aid unasked in the waiting chamber.
dialogue_variations: Glinda: "You have come in the good way."
Guard girl: "She asked us very prettily."

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If south_country_approach_style is DIRECT_HURRY or if Dorothy speaks chiefly of Kansas and Aunt Em by this point.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Glinda greets the party, then moves gradually toward the Silver Shoes explanation.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Glinda shortens preliminaries and turns quickly to Kansas, saying in effect that a child who has come in such haste should hear the homeward truth without delay.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Keep the marvel plain and the pity simple, so that Glinda's wisdom seems to step directly toward the little girl's chief desire.

npc_reactions: Glinda becomes brisker in practical help.
Lion grows visibly sadder because departure feels nearer.
environmental_details: Less ceremonial waiting before the throne audience.
dialogue_variations: Glinda references Kansas sooner.
Attendants remark on Dorothy's urgency.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If south_country_approach_style is ORDERLY_COMPANY.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Glinda addresses Dorothy first and the companions after.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Glinda's gaze and first words include the whole company, and she begins assigning futures in a more ceremonial sequence because Dorothy has presented them as one proper party.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Describe each companion in turn, and then let Glinda's orderly kindness gather them together as if they belonged in that bright room.

npc_reactions: Glinda shows increased respect.
Scarecrow and Tin Woodman stand more confidently.
environmental_details: Attendants prepare places for all four travelers.
The threshold feels more formal and welcoming.
dialogue_variations: Glinda: "You have come together very properly."

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If Oil-Can accessibility is foregrounded by S6_C2 path C or earlier practical-care choices.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Tin Woodman weeps in farewell scenes without practical mention of rust.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Dorothy or an attendant keeps the Oil-Can near, and the Tin Woodman makes a small grateful remark that she has remembered him even at the last.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Use one little practical detail, for in this tale affection is often shown by remembering what another creature needs.

npc_reactions: Tin Woodman becomes calmer and more grateful.
environmental_details: Oil-Can is visible near Dorothy's basket or at her hand.
dialogue_variations: Tin Woodman: "You remembered the oil-can, and that was very kind."

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If farewell_cadence is IMMEDIATE_HOMEWARD or if Dorothy's cumulative tendency is strongly Home-Longing.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Glinda explains the Silver Shoes with calm completeness and then allows the farewell to unfold at moderate pace.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Glinda moves almost at once from revelation to instruction, and her lines emphasize that the way home is ready now, if Dorothy has the courage to use it.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Let Glinda's plain wisdom come quickly, as one opens a door that has stood ready all along.

npc_reactions: Glinda becomes more direct.
Companions restrain themselves from prolonging the parting.
environmental_details: The ruby room feels smaller and more immediate.
dialogue_variations: Glinda shortens ceremonial speech and moves to instruction.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If farewell_cadence is COMPANIONS_FIRST or HESITANT_BALANCE, or if Dorothy lingers over parting from friends.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Glinda instructs kindly but keeps the scene moving toward departure.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Glinda allows longer pauses, answers one more question without impatience, and explicitly permits a gentler cadence before directing Dorothy to the Shoes again.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Show Glinda's power by her patience, for she can wait a little and yet lose nothing of authority.

npc_reactions: Glinda becomes more maternal.
Companions speak more freely in farewell.
environmental_details: The throne room hush lengthens.
Attendants do not press forward.
dialogue_variations: Glinda: "I do not wonder you linger, my child."

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If Dorothy has repeatedly prioritized companions over speed, especially with lawful farewell choices.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: Each companion receives a farewell line, but without explicit callback to earlier devotion patterns.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: Scarecrow, Tin Woodman, and Lion each name one remembered act of Dorothy's care in turn, creating a chain of gratitude before she departs.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Let the thanks come one after another, in the simple order of the road they have traveled together.

npc_reactions: Scarecrow becomes openly grateful.
Tin Woodman becomes more tearful.
Lion becomes more declarative in loyalty.
environmental_details: Farewell stretches into distinct little stations of parting.
dialogue_variations: Scarecrow recalls being listened to.
Tin Woodman recalls practical care.
Lion recalls rescue or comfort.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If emotional ledger contains prior compassion toward the Lion, especially secret feeding in captivity or choosing him over convenience, and/or S6_C1 path C heightened protectiveness.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: The Lion is sorrowful and loyal in farewell.
reactivity_trigger_specs.triggered_behavior: The Lion's farewell becomes the most physically intimate of the three; he comes close, lowers his great head, and speaks as one who owes Dorothy both life and courage.
reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Name his soft, shaggy mane and his hanging head plainly, and then let one honest sentence carry the weight of remembered kindness.

npc_reactions: Lion becomes fiercely tender.
Dorothy's sorrow deepens in response.
environmental_details: The Lion stands nearest Dorothy at the threshold.
dialogue_variations: Lion explicitly recalls Dorothy's past mercy or rescue.

reactivity_trigger_specs.condition: If session_end_state is FAREWELL_SUSPENDED, FAREWELL_COMPLETED_READY_TO_DEPART, or DEPARTURE_INTERRUPTED_BY_LAST_EMBRACE.
reactivity_trigger_specs.default_behavior: The next session begins at the heel-click threshold in Glinda's ruby room.

reactivity_trigger_specs.narrative_execution: Resume exactly where the heart was left, so that the room, the faces, and the waiting Shoes seem never to have moved at all.

Companions begin either waiting, standing firm, or embracing.
environmental_details: Ruby room staging changes by stored farewell arrangement.
dialogue_variations: Glinda's first line differs by end-state.
Companion first motions differ by end-state.

resets_between_episodes.why: It belongs only to the rocky crossing scene and cannot follow the party into the Quadling country.

resets_between_episodes.element: South gate admission procedure
resets_between_episodes.why: Once Glinda's guards have admitted Dorothy, the threshold business is finished and should not clutter throne-room logic.

resets_between_episodes.element: Preparation-room servant behavior
resets_between_episodes.why: It is a scene-specific hospitality beat, not a story-defining relationship on its own.

resets_between_episodes.element: Session-end freeze on the unresolved heel-click
resets_between_episodes.why: The pause exists to end the session cleanly; next episode resumes from it but does not preserve the freeze as active time.

persists_across_full_story.why: It governs whether coercive monkey power remains available and must remain exact through transfer and release.
Learning the true power of the Shoes changes the final logic of the whole story.
It is the quest spine that tells the runtime what Dorothy believes will take her home.

persists_across_full_story.element: Named companion disposition shifts for Scarecrow, Tin Woodman, Cowardly Lion, Monkey King, and Glinda
persists_across_full_story.why: These relationships define how the world answers Dorothy's loyalty, courage, and orderliness.

persists_across_full_story.element: player_historical_archive_categories entries created in this session
persists_across_full_story.why: Farewell, power use, and homeward choices are the final moral read on Dorothy and must remain referenceable.
It determines the exact opening image and emotional pressure of the next session.

escalates_with_accumulation.behavioral_pattern: Dorothy treats magical power as duty rather than vanity

thresholds.at_2_instances: Good rulers and bound magical beings answer with slightly easier trust and fewer corrective lines.
thresholds.at_4_instances: Glinda and other authorities openly name Dorothy as safe with power and explain rules more generously.
thresholds.at_6_or_more_instances: The narrator consistently frames Dorothy as power-reluctant and just, and magical transfers carry ceremonial approval.

escalates_with_accumulation.behavioral_pattern: Dorothy delays her own advantage to care for companions

thresholds.at_2_instances: Companions volunteer gratitude and practical help more readily.
thresholds.at_4_instances: Farewells and crisis scenes include explicit remembered kindness and stronger self-sacrificing loyalty.
thresholds.at_6_or_more_instances: The whole ending tilts Tender-Hearted: small acts of care are named often, and companions treat Dorothy as the center of their good fortune.

escalates_with_accumulation.behavioral_pattern: Dorothy presses plain truth or proof before accepting spectacle

thresholds.at_2_instances: Scarecrow and Glinda answer her in more direct question-and-answer form.
thresholds.at_4_instances: Illusions and ceremonies are narrated more barely, with quicker exposure of what is practical beneath them.
thresholds.at_6_or_more_instances: The narrator's symbolic frame strongly marks Dorothy as Humbug-Piercing, and authorities are either relieved by her honesty or gently embarrassed by it.

escalates_with_accumulation.behavioral_pattern: Dorothy chooses Kansas over delay whenever the road home appears

thresholds.at_2_instances: Scenes mention Aunt Em, the house, or the great gray prairie more often.
thresholds.at_4_instances: Helpful rulers shorten ceremony and move quickly to practical homeward solutions.
thresholds.at_6_or_more_instances: The story's final movement becomes sharply homeward in tone, and reunions land with sudden, plain force.

escalates_with_accumulation.behavioral_pattern: Dorothy breaks form when affection overcomes order

thresholds.at_2_instances: Companions stand nearer and touch more freely in parting scenes.
thresholds.at_4_instances: Farewell scenes grow less ceremonial and more physically affectionate, with Glinda permitting more pauses.
thresholds.at_6_or_more_instances: The narrator consistently frames Dorothy's goodness through loving disorder, and final separations become visibly harder for all around her.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Thereafter mention Dorothy's use of the Golden Cap as a plain, sensible duty that set one thing right and left no vanity behind it.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Responsible spending of wonder for the common good.
freeform_guidelines.freeform_alignment_input: cautious, dutiful, rule-following, protective of the group
hard_limits: Do not allow extra Golden Cap uses beyond the final lawful command.
Do not let ordinary force overcome the Hammer-Heads.
Do not let the Monkeys carry Dorothy to Kansas.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Dorothy may wish to settle the matter at once and spare her friends further bruises.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: The hill had no common road, and the Cap's charm was the one clean help still left to her.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Thereafter note that Dorothy likes the world to prove itself before she spends a rare enchantment upon it.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Testing necessity before using scarce power.
hard_limits: Do not permit a successful route around, under, or over the hill by ordinary travel.
Do not invent new tools or allies absent from the scene.
Do not preserve the final Monkey command unspent.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Dorothy may wish to look first and be sure no plainer road is being neglected.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: Each gap and slope was shut by a shooting head, so the rocks themselves taught her there was no other passage.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Thereafter remember that Dorothy first tried her own brave little voice against rude force before she accepted rescue.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Personal defiance before borrowed power.
hard_limits: Do not let Dorothy defeat or tame the Hammer-Heads by speech alone.
Do not allow graphic violence on the hill.
Do not allow Dorothy to be harmed by the Monkeys or lose Toto here.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Dorothy may wish to rebuke wicked behavior herself before calling on magic.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: The Hammer-Heads were too rough and stubborn to be softened by brave words, so the road still had to be won by the Cap.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Thereafter show the South Country answering Dorothy's questions plainly because she let the country teach her how to enter it.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Receiving help through courtesy and adaptation.
hard_limits: Do not permit stealth, combat, or trick entry into Glinda's castle.
Do not depict Glinda as inaccessible to honest petition.
Do not restore Monkey help.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Dorothy may wish to ask what is proper in a strange and orderly land.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: The red-clad people knew the road and customs better than she did, and plain asking opened more than haste would have done.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Thereafter keep Kansas close in the prose, so that even red roads and bright gates feel shortened by Dorothy's haste to get home.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Homesick urgency overriding ceremony.
hard_limits: Do not allow Dorothy to be rude, slangy, or cruel to helpful Southerners.
Do not skip the gate admission entirely.
Do not let Glinda's audience be forced by violence.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Dorothy may wish to press straight on because Kansas seems at last within reach.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: Even in haste she still had to pass by Glinda's lawful gate, for good rulers are not entered as one runs into a field.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Thereafter describe Dorothy as keeping her queer little company in good order, as if friendship itself were a proper procession.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Honoring companions through practical order.
hard_limits: Do not split the party into separate admissions.
Do not invent new repairs beyond checking visible readiness.
Do not let Dorothy forget the Oil-Can if the scene calls for practical care.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Dorothy may wish to see that each friend is fit and decent before standing before a great ruler.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: The last threshold was best crossed together, for Glinda's house answered good arrangement with easier welcome.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Thereafter let the room tighten around Dorothy's plain wish for Kansas, so that farewell feels swift, honest, and a little sharp.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Choosing home before sorrow can delay action.
freeform_guidelines.freeform_alignment_input: decisive, homesick, bluntly practical, afraid of lingering pain
hard_limits: Do not let Dorothy leave Oz before Glinda explains the Silver Shoes.
Do not let companions resent Dorothy selfishly for wanting Kansas.
Do not cancel the farewell entirely.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Dorothy may wish to go at once while her courage is still strong.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: Glinda still had to teach the Shoes' command plainly, and the companions still had to hear the truth of parting.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Thereafter give each companion his proper little portion of the ruby room, because Dorothy has chosen to make farewell an ordered duty of love.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Completing parting faithfully and justly.
hard_limits: Do not let Dorothy remain in Oz indefinitely.
Do not alter the companions' canon futures.
Do not turn Glinda vague or withholding about the Shoes.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Dorothy may wish to honor each friend before taking the last step home.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: Glinda, who loved kindness and order, allowed the leave-taking to unfold in proper turn before the command was spoken.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Thereafter keep a thoughtful hush over the scene, for Dorothy has asked whether two good things may be held together a little longer.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Seeking a middle way between home and friendship.
hard_limits: Do not offer a permanent stay in Oz without cost.
Do not let delay remove the need for eventual parting.
Do not obscure the Shoes' power once Glinda has revealed it.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Dorothy may wish to linger a little now that the answer is safe in her hands.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: Glinda could allow the question, but not change the plain truth that every delay made Kansas later and farewell no easier in the end.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Thereafter hold the next scene in a quiet breath of waiting, because Dorothy has asked time of sorrow while home already stands beneath her feet.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Clean pause before irreversible action.
freeform_guidelines.freeform_alignment_input: softly delaying, emotionally honest, needing one more breath, torn between two goods
hard_limits: Do not resolve the heel-click within this session.
Do not let the pause become abandonment of Kansas.
Do not remove Toto from Dorothy's arms.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Dorothy may need one little moment more before she can command the Shoes.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: Glinda's patience could grant a breath, but not forever, because the power was ready and the choice could not be escaped by standing still.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Thereafter keep the room solemn and finished, as if every word has been spoken and only courage remains to do the last plain thing.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Completing closure before departure.
hard_limits: Do not click the heels on-screen in this session.
Do not reopen new practical obstacles.
Do not let companions selfishly detain Dorothy.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Dorothy may wish to finish all farewells properly and stand ready at once.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: The session must stop at the very edge of action, for the true hook is Dorothy's owned resolve, not the transport itself.

freeform_guidelines.narrator_behavior: Thereafter reopen the farewell in a warm little confusion of tears and touch, because love has caught Dorothy just as she meant to go.
freeform_guidelines.spirit: Affection breaking through completed form.
freeform_guidelines.freeform_alignment_input: impulsive, tearful, affectionate, unable to leave neatly
hard_limits: Do not let Dorothy actually depart within this session.
Do not turn the scene comic in a mocking way.
Do not create a new plan that avoids eventual use of the Silver Shoes.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_acknowledge: Dorothy may almost go and then find her loving heart carrying her back for one more embrace.
freeform_guidelines.fold_back_redirect: Even magic had to wait upon that last rush of feeling, but only for a little while, because Glinda's truth and Kansas still stood before her.

session_close_design.resolution_prose: At last you have what you came to seek. Glinda has told you the plain truth, and it is a wonderful one: the Silver Shoes can bear you over the desert and set you down in Kansas in three little steps. But to reach home you must first give up the Golden Cap, and then you must part from the good friends who have journeyed with you so faithfully. So you kiss the Lion upon his soft, shaggy mane, and he tries to look brave for your sake. Then you kiss the Tin Woodman, though his tears are most dangerous to his joints, and then you hug the Scarecrow, for his painted face is not fit for kissing. The great room is bright with red and white and the rubies of Glinda’s throne shine like little fires, but your heart is sorrowful and happy together. Home is no longer a wish only. It is near now, and yet one thing remains to be done before you go.
session_close_design.hook_transition: You stand still for one little moment, with Toto warm in your arms, and you know your long journey has truly come to its end. Then Glinda steps down from her ruby throne to give you a good-bye kiss, and your three dear friends wait to learn how you will leave them.

session_end_choice.choice_question: When you speak your last good-bye, how do you choose to part from the friends who helped carry you home at last?

option_a.text: Speak first to the Scarecrow, and leave him with cheerful thanks for his brains and his friendship.
option_a.next_session_opens: With your arms around the Scarecrow’s soft, stuffed body, as you choose bright words to make the sorrow easier.

option_b.text: Turn first to the Tin Woodman, and thank him tenderly for his faithful heart and care.
option_b.next_session_opens: Beside the Tin Woodman, whose polished face is wet with tears, as you choose the words of a loving farewell.

option_c.text: Go first to the Lion, and comfort him bravely, so he may bear the parting like a king.
option_c.next_session_opens: With your hands in the Lion’s soft, shaggy mane, as you choose whether to be merry, tender, or quick in saying farewell.

session_end_choice.final_line: Home is waiting, and so are your last words.

q1_entry_point.detail: The cold open begins at the first live dramatic proof that ordinary means have failed: Scarecrow already fallen, Lion immediately thrown back, road blocked, final resource in play. No passive scenic runway precedes the tension.

q3_first_choice_timing.detail: Branching Choice #1 is reached within the opening setup at approximately 140-170 words from the cold open text, well before the 300-word limit.

q4_consequential_choices.detail: Branching Choice #4 fails the consequence standard in Phase 6/Phase 2 terms because this is the terminal session and its listed 'next_session_payoff' points to a nonexistent continuation despite the session architecture stating no sequel hook is required. Revision needed in Phase 6 consequence map and Phase 7 close design: convert Choice #4's downstream payoff from 'next session opening state' to an in-session terminal payoff frame or explicitly mark it as final-session retention-only with no future-session dependency.

q5_stakes_within_60_seconds.detail: Internal stakes are clear before the first external branch: Dorothy wants to reach Glinda and get home, and the road ends unless she spends her last Monkey command.

q6_early_decision_visible_later.detail: S6_C1 has named later visibility: Monkey King tone, Glinda's read of Dorothy, and companion trust all echo later in the Glinda sequence per Phase 6 reactivity triggers and payoff notes.

q7_breath_beat.detail: The Breath beat is placed at minutes 8:00-10:00 in Phase 4 beat map, but the checklist requires a breath beat between minutes 10-13. Revision needed in Phase 4 session architecture: shift the preparation-room comic reward later so the release lands inside 10-13 without collapsing the Twist beat.

q8_moral_gray_area.detail: The moral-weight choice is S6_C3. Values in tension: home, devotion to companions, honest acceptance of necessary loss. No option is framed as objectively wrong.

q9_exit_emotional_state.detail: The designed session-end state is split between two incompatible endings: Phase 6 S6_C4 correctly exits on anticipation, but Phase 7 session_close_design replaces it with a different farewell-order choice and implies a next session. Revision needed in Phase 7: align the close design to end on S6_C4's unresolved heel-click commitment so the user exits carrying ANTICIPATION rather than structural confusion.

q10_talkability.detail: At least two choices are highly talkable: spending the last Monkey command at once or not, and whether Dorothy chooses home immediately or lingers over her friends.

q11_hard_ban_scan.detail: Banned sentence-level modern/AI mold appears in generated prose: 'It was not ungrateful, only practical' (S6_E1 option B outcome), which closely trips the contrast-framing mold family; 'It was a little disorderly, to be sure, but there was nothing wicked in it. It was only the confusion of love.' (S6_C4 option C outcome) also leans into modern explanatory contrast scaffolding. Revision needed in Phase 5 prose outcomes: recast these lines into plain additive Baum-style narration without contrast-template framing.

q12_trailing_simile_scan.detail: Trailing similes appear in action/narrative lines: cold open 'the Lion goes rolling back as if a cannon ball had struck him'; S6_C1A 'as quietly as if one crossed a brook by bridge'; S6_C1C 'as if courage also were a kind of command'; multiple other outcomes use 'as if' comparison tails. Revision needed in Phase 5 prose outcomes: replace simile constructions with plain factual description and practical consequence.

q13_sentence_mold_scan.detail: Flagged mold: 'It was not ungrateful, only practical' in S6_E1 option B outcome matches prohibited contrast-framing scaffolding. Revision needed in Phase 5: rewrite that sentence into direct moral naming without the 'not X, only Y' structure.

q14_voice_authenticity.detail: Cold open clearly carries at least two signature techniques: plain marvel delivery and sequential connective chaining, with direct emotional naming and practical consequence. Random outcomes also sustain authorial markers: S6_E4C uses gentle comic deflation and practical absurdity; S6_C3B uses question-answer exposition logic and direct moral labeling; S6_C1B uses peril-then-practicality and connective stepwise narration. Attribution test passes as recognizably Baum-like.

q15_fourteen_point_audit.detail: Not all 14 points pass. Point 12 flags due to simile-heavy and somewhat decorative comparison use outside dialogue, which departs from the stricter Voice Lock execution standard. Return to Phase 5 and simplify flagged lines into plainer declaratives.

q16_diction_fingerprint.detail: Dorothy's internal and spoken framing stays plain, courteous, and home-oriented. Scarecrow, Tin Woodman, Lion, and Glinda each retain distinct concerns and rhythms consistent with the Voice Lock fingerprints.

fourteen_point_audit_results.location: Across Phase 5 generated prose, comparison-heavy narration and occasional decorative explanatory phrasing around outcomes weaken the plainness standard expected by the audit; strongest examples in S6_C1A, S6_C1C, S6_E1B.

q17_canon_integrity.detail: Canon/session integrity conflict: Phase 7 session_close_design introduces a different final branching choice about which friend Dorothy addresses first, replacing the approved S6_C4 heel-click threshold. This alters the final event structure outside the confirmed session map. Revision needed in Phase 7: remove the alternate farewell-order close and restore the canon-aligned final choice at event 212/213 as the unresolved heel-click commitment.

q18_character_truth.detail: NPC behavior remains within StoryGuard Layer 3 truths: Glinda is calm and explanatory, Lion sorrowful and protective, Tin Woodman tender and polite, Scarecrow practical and grateful, Monkey King formal but responsive to just treatment.

q19_world_reactivity.detail: World reactivity is active and visible through NPC tone shifts, gate behavior, servant treatment, Monkey King warmth, Glinda's altered reception, and farewell cadence flags. Environmental, NPC, supernatural, and symbolic categories all manifest on-page.

q20_persistent_state_consistency.detail: State inconsistency appears between Phase 5 and Phase 6: multiple S6_C1 paths set environmental flag 'golden_cap_command_state -> UNDER_DOROTHY_CONTROL_TWO_OR_FEWER_AVAILABLE' even though the prose and schema indicate Dorothy has spent the final command and should be at zero under Dorothy until transfer. Revision needed in Phase 5 and Phase 6: normalize Golden Cap post-use state to a single exact terminal value consistent with the schema and prose.

q21_world_noticed_signals.detail: Not every significant state change has a valid in-world acknowledgment. S6_E1 option B explicitly uses 'NO SIGNAL — state change is minor,' which fails the requirement that every significant persistent state change receive an in-world signal. Revision needed in Phase 5 Task 8: write a subtle in-scene acknowledgment for that path instead of a meta placeholder.

q22_social_echo_defining_lines.detail: All four branching choices have three defining lines each, all under 20 words, voice-consistent, provocative, and curiosity-generating.

q23_alignment_balance.detail: Each branching choice spans lawful/neutral/chaotic distinctly, and no alignment is systematically framed as the obviously rewarded path. Registers remain differentiated across all four branches.

revision_instructions.instruction: Rework S6_C4 so its consequence model is terminal-session valid: remove nonexistent next-session dependency and define its payoff as final-session retention-only or in-session terminal state.
Shift the Breath beat later so the comic/wonder release lands between minutes 10 and 13 without losing the Glinda audience structure.
Replace the alternate farewell-order close with the approved unresolved heel-click choice so the session exits on anticipation, not conflicting end structures.
Rewrite flagged contrast-framed lines into plain additive Baum-style narration, especially 'It was not ungrateful, only practical' and similar explanatory scaffolds.
Remove simile constructions from action and narrative lines and restate those beats as plain factual description with practical consequence.
Eliminate the prohibited 'not X, only Y' mold in S6_E1B and any similar contrast-template phrasing.
Revise flagged prose until all 14 Voice Lock audit points pass, with priority on plainness and removal of decorative comparison phrasing.
Align session_close_design to the established S6_C4 ending and remove the contradictory alternate final branch about which friend Dorothy addresses first.
Normalize Golden Cap depletion state after the final use so all paths record the exact same canon-consistent post-use command status.
Replace the meta placeholder 'NO SIGNAL — state change is minor' with a subtle in-world acknowledgment line in authorial voice.
